Thanks for joining #SecClinton's #GlobalTownHall! Stay tuned to http://t.co/UKm9plIx for video and text transcript.
#SecClinton: We have to deal with trendlines, not just headlines -- the big projects that will have an impact on the world. #GlobalTownHall
Wrapping up #SecClinton #GlobalTownHall with surprise guest.  Keep watching...
#SecClinton: We have a very close relationship with Latin America -- I want it to be even closer. #GlobalTownHall
#SecClinton: I will do everything I can to make sure that women compete at the highest levels around the world. #GlobalTownHall
#SecClinton: My hope is that the U.S. and #China will defy history together. #GlobalTownHall
#SecClinton: We believe firmly in supporting reform in #Burma, in helping #Mali defend against extremists. #GlobalTownHall
#SecClinton: U.S. wants to be your partner. We want to create the conditions so more countries can achieve success. #GlobalTownHall
#SecClinton: We see political, economic, and institutional progress in Africa. #GlobalTownHall #AskState
#SecClinton: When you put barriers in the way of half the population, you're putting brakes on your own development. #GlobalTownHall #women
#SecClinton: U.S. has an important relationship with #Russia. Over the last four years, we have seen New START, cooperation on #Afghanistan.
#GlobalTownHall Question: "Which Secretary do you admire most?" #SecClinton: "I admire Secretary Seward (Lincoln's #SecState)."
#SecClinton in response to a question from Antarctica: I hope we will make progress to protect this treasure. #GlobalTownHall #AskState
#SecClinton: We've made it clear that if Hamas renounces violence and becomes a political group, there is a place for them at the table.
#SecClinton: We have to be smart about how we use our economies. Trans-Pacific Partnership is one way to enhance our relationship. #AskState
#SecClinton: In today's world we need to be more open, innovative, and transparent in our economic cooperation. #GlobalTownHall

#SecClinton: Much of Africa has not had the kind of attention it deserves on a range of issues -- but that is changing. #GlobalTownHall

#SecClinton: After four years in this job, traveling nearly a million miles, my faith in our country and our future is stronger than ever.
#SecClinton: The United States must continue to lead: in the Middle East, in North Africa, and around the world.
#SecClinton: Concerns about stability in North Africa are not new, but we need to increase pressure on terrorist groups in the region.
#SecClinton: Implementation has begun on all 29 action items identified in ARB.  85% are on track to be completed by end of March.
#SecClinton: I saw firsthand what ARB called exceptional coordination; no delays, no denials of support from Washington, or our military.

#SecClinton: I am confident that, with your help, we will keep the United States safe, strong and exceptional.
#SecClinton: Our men and women who serve overseas know that we accept a certain level of risk to protect this country we love.
#SecClinton: I have accepted every one of the ARB recommendations, asked they be implemented quickly, with clear timelines for completion.
#SecClinton: I am determined to leave our country and the @StateDept safer, stronger and more secure.
#SecClinton: Our security professionals get it right more than 99% of the time against difficult odds. I trust them with my life.
